headline: American Electric Power (AEP) Gets Price Target Hikes from Evercore ISI and Argus
summary: American Electric Power Company, Inc. (NASDAQ:AEP) is included among the 14 Stocks on the Verge of Becoming Dividend Aristocrats. On March 5, Evercore ISI raised its price recommendation on American Electric Power Company, Inc. (NASDAQ:AEP) to $153 from $137 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm updated estimates for many power and […]

headline: Utilities Trade Focus On Quarterly Results For Long-Term Outlooks
summary: As data center development fuels an unprecedented wave of large-load customer contracts, US electric utilities are emphasizing long-term spending and growth visibility. Read more here.

headline: American Electric Power (AEP) Names Adrian Rodriguez President and COO of AEP Texas
summary: American Electric Power Company Inc. (NASDAQ:AEP) is one of the best NASDAQ stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On March 6, American Electric Power, or simply AEP, announced that Adrian Rodriguez has been named president and chief operating officer of AEP Texas. Joining the company on March 30, Rodriguez will report directly to AEP […]
